scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INFO sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number]info[pid] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INFO Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 0 Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: pqrxyz Content-Type: application/spark+xml Content-Length: [len]
<GetEndpointInfoRequest xmlns="http://xml.avaya.com/endpointAPI"> <clientId>442</clientId> <requestId>636</requestId> <targetId>-2</targetId> </GetEndpointInfoRequest>
